title: AI Engineering Platform — Capabilities
description: The canonical machine-readable capability graph. See .ai/state/capability-mapping.md for the human-readable projection. The 'depends_on' and 'consumed_by' arrays are the dependency model. The 'layer' is 0 (Infrastructure), 1 (Provider Model), 2 (Domain Orchestration), or 3 (User Surface). The 'completion_status' is the derived 8-value state (NotStarted, Planned, Ready, InProgress, Delivered, Verified, Blocked, Deferred) used by the Status / Continue / Approve / Resume / Finish command protocol; it is derived from the existing canonical 5-value 'status' and the milestone / task / evidence data — see .ai/state/capability-mapping.md § 4 for the mapping rule.

status.description: The canonical 5-value capability status. Do not change without an ADR.

completion_status.description: Derived 8-value state. See .ai/state/capability-mapping.md § 4 for the mapping rule. NotStarted = not in the graph. Planned = accepted into a milestone that is Planned, no plan yet. Ready = a Ready or Awaiting Approval plan with a T-ID in tasks.json. InProgress = a task in tasks.json with status InProgress references this capability. Delivered = implementation merged on a branch with a commit, but the implementation report and milestones.json evidence link are not yet complete. Verified = Delivered + the implementation report exists + the test evidence exists + the Git commit is in the milestones.json evidence array. Blocked = a Blocked task in tasks.json references the capability. Deferred = the milestone that delivers the capability is Deferred in milestones.json.

product_outcome.description: One-sentence statement of the user-visible outcome the capability produces. Derived from the user-journey step(s) the capability supports.

delivered_by_tasks.description: T-IDs (from .ai/state/tasks.json) that deliver this capability. Empty array until a task claims the capability.

next_task.description: T-ID of the first Ready task that advances the capability, or null if no task is queued.

blocked_by.description: C-IDs whose status blocks this capability. Empty unless a Blocked task in tasks.json references the capability in its blocker field.

evidence.description: The artefacts that prove the capability is implemented and validated. All sub-arrays default to empty; populated when the milestone that delivers the capability closes.

acceptance_criteria.description: Bulleted list of what-must-be-true for the capability to be considered complete, derived from the milestone's Definition of done in ROADMAP.md.

completed_criteria.description: Subset of acceptance_criteria whose evidence exists today. Drives the Delivered vs. Verified transition.

adr.description: ADR-NNN, or null if not graduated

last_updated.description: The date the row was last touched (status change, evidence link, or completion_status recomputation).
